ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zou Dan (ÈÑí‰∏π). Killed by the rebelling Yan Rou, 4,000 of his men are killed as well. Zou Dan was affiliated with Gongsun Zan. Zou Dan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
